titleEn: New Indo-Israel joint venture aims to build year-round avocado supply in India
contentHtml: Israeli avocado cooperative Global Galil and Indian nursery and orchard management company Indo Israel Avocado have partnered to establish Galil Avo India, a joint venture focused on developing a year-round avocado supply chain for the Indian market. For Harshit Godha, CEO and Director of Galil Avo…
